name: volatile-gc
description: Volatile Knowledge Layer GC — single working-memory:run-gc op that scans all *.volatile.json sidecars, expires ttl/session faces, rolls over daily TODO items, and writes a summary to active/shared/tmp/. No external scripts required.

params.content:
# Volatile GC Report

## Expired
{{gc_result.expired}} faces marked expired

## Rolled Over
{{gc_result.rolledOver}} TODO items carried forward
